name: expert-ruoyi-permission
description: RuoYi framework permission configuration expert. Invoke when users encounter permission check failures, Access Denied errors, buttons/menus not displaying, @PreAuthorize issues, v-hasPermi errors, or sys_menu/sys_role_menu configuration problems. 支持中文触发：权限校验失败、Access Denied、按钮不显示、菜单不显示、权限配置、PreAuthorize、hasPermi。
